evals.prompt: Scan this README.md for any email addresses that should be removed
evals.expected_output: Identifies email addresses and replaces them with GitHub Issues links or generic placeholders

evals.prompt: Check pyproject.toml for personal data leaks before we publish
evals.expected_output: Removes email fields from package metadata and authors list

evals.prompt: Add a contact section to our CONTRIBUTING.md but make sure no personal emails end up in it
evals.expected_output: Adds a contact section that references GitHub Issues instead of an email address
